calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar May-18-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for Petitioner.

The Court stated that the issue regarding notice to the Franchise Tax Board has been addressed because a letter was received from them. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
